name: apply-discount
instruction: Modify `find_price` to return the price with a 20% discount. Multiply the price by 80 and divide by 100: `p.price * 80 / 100`. Keep the default value (0) unchanged. Do not change any other function.
layer3_hint: Available: `list.find(xs, (x) => bool)` returns `Option[A]`. Integer arithmetic: `*`, `/`. `list.fold(xs, init, (acc, x) => val)` reduces a list.
